---
title: "Margin Caption Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['#note\(', 'counter: none', 'Figure']
        - []
      ensurePdfRegexMatches:
        - ['Figure 1', 'CAP-MARGINCAP']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This document tests per-figure margin captions.

![CAP-MARGINCAP test caption](test-image.png){#fig-margin-cap cap-location="margin"}

Text with REF-MARGINCAP pointing to @fig-margin-cap.
